raw_consumer_statement:
I purchased tickets for the XXXX XXXX concert on XX/XX/2025, totaling {$540.00}. On the night of the event, XX/XX/XXXX, my party and I arrived on time and entered the venue. When we attempted to access our assigned and fully paid-for seats, staff directed us to a secondary line at the back of the venue without providing any explanation. We were denied access to the seats we purchased. 

By XXXX XXXX, the concert had already started, and we were still stuck in that line. We remained there for almost XXXX hours with no access to our assigned seating while the event continued. We paid for specific seats and the services associated with them, but those services were not rendered. 

I contacted XXXX multiple times by phone and email, but they offered no assistance. Their response was that because we were allowed into the venue, the ticket had been fulfilledeven though we were never given the seating we paid for. They ultimately advised me to file a dispute with my credit card issuer at my own discretion. 

I then contacted Citi Bank, provided all required information, and submitted a written statement. Within a few days, Citi closed my case, claiming they heard from XXXX and concluded that I, the customer, was responsible. This outcome is extremely upsetting, as I am Citis customer and they failed to advocate for me or properly investigate the dispute. They accepted XXXX explanation without considering the evidence I provided. 

I am filing this complaint because I paid for services I did not receive Access to the venue is not the same as receiving assigned seats., XXXX refused to resolve the issue, and my credit card issuer dismissed my dispute without a fair review.
